title: Manifest hash change reconnect rehydrate
goal: Verify client projection rehydrates when a newer manifest hash arrives during resume replay.
preconditions: Backend and web app are running.
At least one session can be started from lobby.
setup: Start session A with default profile and connect to stream.
Capture current manifest hash from Recent Messages or session API.
injectScenario: Start session B with changed config (line topology or changed seat limits).
Reconnect client to session B using Match route session parameter.
Ensure stream resume includes newer parameter_manifest event.
assertions: Client shows board/seat assumptions from new manifest only.
No stale previous-session projection artifacts remain.
Latest manifest hash in state differs from the old one.
expectedSignals: timeline includes Parameter Manifest event with new hash snippet
board topology and labels update after reconnect without page hard refresh
